checklist.requirement: All fifth-wave adaptive-execution child Beads are closed before closeout.

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Provider backpressure replay evidence does not cover RPC, TUI, or session pressure surfaces.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed: added deterministic provider streaming backpressure replay coverage and JSONL evidence artifact across native provider fixtures.
child_artifact_map.title: Replay provider streaming backpressure across native providers
validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/tmp cargo test provider_streaming -- --nocapture

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Tool artifact lifecycle evidence does not delete user files or authorize cleanup without operator confirmation.

child_artifact_map.title: Gate tool artifact lifecycle quotas and redaction

child_artifact_map.title: Detect extension permission drift against provenance manifests
validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/tmp cargo test extension_policy ext_conformance

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Validation refresh scheduling does not run cargo, overwrite evidence, or weaken strict drop-in claim gates.
child_artifact_map.title: Schedule validation evidence refresh by value and pressure

checklist.requirement: Every fifth-wave child bead maps to pushed commits, source paths, validation commands, and claim-boundary text.
Provider streaming replay preserves semantic chunks while bounding low-value backpressure deltas.
Tool output artifacts have bounded lifecycle metadata, redaction, retention, and safe-delete classification.
Branch-heavy session replay emits bounded selected-branch evidence and explicit fallback behavior.
TUI degradation drill preserves semantic output and user input under sustained event pressure.
Extension permission drift detector fails closed on capability expansion without trustworthy provenance.
Validation refresh scheduler ranks stale evidence by value, cost, duplicate coverage, headroom, and dirty state without running validation.

evidence.boundary: Beads issue state and close reasons remain the work ledger.
Agent Mail coordinates ownership but does not replace Beads, git, source inspection, or validation evidence.
The closeout gate summarizes existing evidence and does not mutate runtime sources.
Heavy Cargo validation evidence for child work must prove RCH execution.
Staged UBS remains mandatory before closeout commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before closeout commit.
Fifth-wave adaptive execution closeout evidence is advisory and does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.
The closeout gate summarizes child evidence and does not replace source tests, contracts, Beads, pushed commits, RCH, UBS, or CI.

checklist.requirement: Closeout source boundaries preserve Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, UBS, ledger, child-artifact, and release-claim authorities.
All prerequisite child commits are pushed to origin/main and legacy origin/master before final closeout generation.
Required closeout quality gates passed for the script, contract, UBS, and Beads ledger.

claim_boundaries.allowed_claim: advisory fifth-wave adaptive execution closeout evidence only

known_limitations: Fifth-wave adaptive execution closeout evidence is advisory operator evidence only.
Provider, tool, session, TUI, extension, and validation-refresh proofs remain their own sources of truth.
This closeout does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.

source_boundary_checks.boundary: Beads issue state and close reasons remain the work ledger.
Agent Mail coordinates ownership but does not replace Beads, git, source inspection, or validation evidence.
The closeout gate summarizes existing evidence and does not mutate runtime sources.
Heavy Cargo validation evidence for child work must prove RCH execution.
Staged UBS remains mandatory before closeout commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before closeout commit.
Fifth-wave adaptive execution closeout evidence is advisory and does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.
The closeout gate summarizes child evidence and does not replace source tests, contracts, Beads, pushed commits, RCH, UBS, or CI.
